---
title: "Optimization & Numerical Methods"
description: "Convex optimization, LP, dynamic programming, gradient methods, fixed-point theorems."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="optimization-numerical-methods"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Optimization & Numerical Methods</h1>
  <p class="lead">Convex optimization, LP, dynamic programming, gradient methods, fixed-point theorems.</p>
</div>
```
